meta.description: Typst Editor: local-first writing with live Typst preview, the Monaco editor, multi-format previews, and PDF tools.

home.heroSubtitle: A focused environment for writing Typst with a modern editor, live preview, and support for many asset types—all running locally.

features.title: Live Typst editing
features.description: Compose Typst with fast feedback as the preview updates while you type.

features.title: Monaco editor
features.description: A VS Code–style editing experience: familiar shortcuts, theming, and productivity.

features.title: Rich file previews
features.description: Preview HTML, SVG, PNG, JPEG, JSON, and Markdown alongside your project.

features.title: PDF preview and tools
features.description: Open PDFs in the app with a built-in viewer and annotation-style workflows.

features.title: Local-first
features.description: Your files stay on your machine—work offline and keep control of your content.

marketingFeatures.title: Instant Live Preview
marketingFeatures.description: See your changes as you type with our blazing-fast live preview. No more waiting for manual recompilation—your formatted document is always right there, allowing for seamless iterations and perfect results.

marketingFeatures.title: Focused Writing Experience
marketingFeatures.description: The Monaco-powered editor provides a familiar, high-performance environment for all your Typst documents. Enjoy features like syntax highlighting, auto-completion that helps you focus on your content
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing writing interface

marketingFeatures.title: Files integration
marketingFeatures.description: Integrates with the Files app on iOS and iPadOS, allowing you to open and save Typst documents to iCloud Drive, Dropbox, Google Drive, and other cloud storage providers.
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing file integration

marketingFeatures.title: Markdown Preview
marketingFeatures.description: Preview Markdown files in the app with a built-in viewer and annotation-style workflows. Perfect for reviewing and refining your documents.
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing Markdown preview

marketingFeatures.title: Annotate PDF
marketingFeatures.description: Annotate PDFs with highlights, comments, and drawings. Perfect for reviewing and refining your documents.
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing PDF annotation

marketingFeatures.title: Dark Mode
marketingFeatures.description: Switch between light and dark mode to suit your preference. Perfect for late-night writing sessions or working in bright environments.
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing dark mode

marketingFeatures.title: Preview Images, SVGs, and More
marketingFeatures.description: Preview images, SVGs, and other assets directly in the editor. Perfect for reviewing and refining your documents.
marketingFeatures.imageAlt: Typst Editor on iPad showing quick access sidebar

marketingFeatures.title: Instant Live Preview

marketingFeatures.title: System Integration
marketingFeatures.description: Seamlessly integrates with your macOS file system. Open files from anywhere, use familiar drag-and-drop, and enjoy a truly native workflow.
